meta.title: CosmoRemote
meta.description: Manage Claude Code and Codex from your phone. CosmoRemote is coming soon for iPhone, iPad, and Android.

hero.eyebrow: For devs who leave the desk
hero.title: CosmoRemote
hero.subtitle: Control your code from anywhere
hero.description: Connect your phone to the Mac running Claude Code or Codex, follow sessions in real time, and keep every project thread close when the app launches.
hero.note: iPhone, iPad, and Android are all Coming Soon. No fake App Store or Play Store buttons until real links exist.

features.title: Keep Claude and Codex close
features.description: CosmoRemote is built for developers who juggle agents, projects, and terminals without wanting to stay glued to the Mac.

items.title: Connect your Mac fast
items.description: Install once with brew, winget, or curl, then start the local connector whenever you are ready to work.

items.title: It finds your agents
items.description: The desktop command detects Claude Code and Codex, starts the session link, and shows the QR in your terminal.

items.title: Pair with one scan
items.description: Scan the QR and connect to the Mac on your network with an authenticated pairing flow.

items.title: Claude or Codex — your call
items.description: Choose the CLI per session so each project gets the right agent before you send a prompt.

items.title: Jump between projects
items.description: Save working directories with friendly names and switch context without retyping paths.

items.title: Watch sessions unfold live
items.description: Streaming output, auto-scroll, and syntax-highlighted code blocks make long agent runs easy to follow.

items.title: Grab output in one tap
items.description: Copy a full session or a single code block when you need to move the answer back into your workflow.

items.title: Know the connection state
items.description: Clear local, remote, and offline indicators keep you oriented before you send anything important.

screenshots.title: The current launch set
screenshots.description: Every screenshot here comes from the newest synchronized App Store export for this locale.

items.title: Control from anywhere
items.caption: Claude Code and Codex riding shotgun, straight from your phone.

items.title: Live session view
items.caption: Watch what your agent is doing without walking back to the desk.

items.title: Project history
items.caption: Sessions stay grouped by project so you always know where you left off.

items.title: Send the next prompt
items.caption: The device already in your hand fires the next command.

items.title: iPad workspace
items.caption: More room for Claude, Codex, and the project switcher side by side.

items.title: Long outputs, calmly
items.caption: The larger layout makes long agent runs easy to scan and review.

items.title: Connection at a glance
items.caption: Local, remote, or offline — the status badge always tells the truth.

items.title: Switch agents in a tap
items.caption: Claude and Codex live in the same remote control surface.

items.title: Launch-ready flow
items.caption: The newest iPad visual rounds out the current store media set.

pricing.title: Start free. Go Pro when you need more agents.
pricing.description: Launch pricing is synced from CosmoHQ: Free includes the daily remote flow, and Pro unlocks parallel work when purchases open.
pricing.monthlyDescription: A flexible Pro option for parallel sessions, unlimited daily messages, and multiple Macs.
pricing.yearlyDescription: The best value for developers who expect CosmoRemote to be part of their daily agent workflow.
pricing.yearlyComparisonTemplate: {monthlyTotal} if billed monthly vs {yearly} on the annual plan.

downloads.title: Store rollout status
downloads.description: CosmoRemote is not launched yet. iPhone, iPad, and Android stay marked Coming Soon until real store URLs are available.

cards.title: iPhone
cards.note: Remote control, live streaming, and session history are being prepared for the iOS release.

cards.title: iPadOS
cards.note: The iPad layout will give sessions, project switching, and output review more room.

cards.title: Android phone
cards.note: Android will follow the same local connection, secure remote access, and history model after its store build is ready.

faq.title: Straight answers before launch
faq.description: No inflated metrics, no fake store links, and no invented reviews.

questions.question: Is CosmoRemote launched?
questions.answer: Not yet. iPhone, iPad, and Android are all marked Coming Soon until real App Store and Play Store links exist.

questions.question: How will local pairing work?
questions.answer: Run cosmoremote start, scan the QR, and the app connects to the Mac running your Claude Code or Codex session.

questions.question: Can I switch between Claude Code and Codex?
questions.answer: Yes. You choose the CLI per session before sending commands.

questions.question: What's included in Free?
questions.answer: Install, QR pairing, CLI and path selection, streaming, history, offline access, and 20 messages per day.

questions.question: What does Pro unlock?
questions.answer: Parallel sessions, unlimited messages per day, multiple Macs, and restore purchases.

questions.question: Why pick yearly?
questions.answer: Yearly ({{yearly_price}}) saves {{yearly_savings}} compared with paying {{monthly_price}} every month for 12 months.

footer.tagline: Coding agents that follow you everywhere.

legal.honesty: Real pre-launch status. No fake installs, ratings, or store links.
